targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeInterval(ts) AS time, max(uptime_seconds) AS v FROM ${database}.system_info WHERE host='${host}' AND $__timeFilter(ts) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time
SELECT $__timeInterval(ts) AS time, avg(load1) AS v FROM ${database}.cpu_system_stats WHERE host='${host}' AND $__timeFilter(ts) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time
SELECT $__timeInterval(ts) AS time, avg(total) AS v FROM ${database}.process_summary WHERE host='${host}' AND $__timeFilter(ts) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time
SELECT $__timeInterval(ts) AS time, max(zombie) AS v FROM ${database}.process_summary WHERE host='${host}' AND $__timeFilter(ts) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

SELECT $__timeInterval(ts) AS time, avg(if(mem_total_bytes=0, 0, mem_used_bytes / mem_total_bytes * 100)) AS v FROM ${database}.memory_stats WHERE host='${host}' AND $__timeFilter(ts) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

SELECT $__timeInterval(ts) AS time, avg(if(swap_total_bytes=0, 0, (swap_total_bytes - swap_free_bytes) / swap_total_bytes * 100)) AS v FROM ${database}.memory_stats WHERE host='${host}' AND $__timeFilter(ts) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time
SELECT $__timeInterval(ts) AS time, avg(if(fds_max=0, 0, fds_allocated / fds_max * 100)) AS v FROM ${database}.system_info WHERE host='${host}' AND $__timeFilter(ts) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time
SELECT $__timeInterval(ts) AS time, avg(if(max=0, 0, count / max * 100)) AS v FROM ${database}.network_conntrack WHERE host='${host}' AND $__timeFilter(ts) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

SELECT $__timeInterval(ts) AS time, toLowCardinality(toString(core)) AS core_id, avg(100 - idle_pct) AS cpu FROM ${database}.cpu_core_stats WHERE host='${host}' AND $__timeFilter(ts) GROUP BY time, core_id ORDER BY time, core_id

SELECT $__timeInterval(ts) AS time, avg(user_pct) AS user, avg(nice_pct) AS nice, avg(system_pct) AS system, avg(iowait_pct) AS iowait, avg(irq_pct) AS irq, avg(softirq_pct) AS softirq, avg(steal_pct) AS steal, avg(guest_pct) AS guest FROM ${database}.cpu_core_stats WHERE host='${host}' AND $__timeFilter(ts) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

SELECT $__timeInterval(ts) AS time, avg(load1) AS load1, avg(load5) AS load5, avg(load15) AS load15 FROM ${database}.cpu_system_stats WHERE host='${host}' AND $__timeFilter(ts) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

SELECT $__timeInterval(ts) AS time, avg(procs_running) AS running, avg(procs_blocked) AS blocked FROM ${database}.cpu_system_stats WHERE host='${host}' AND $__timeFilter(ts) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

SELECT $__timeInterval(ts) AS time, avg(some_avg10) AS some_avg10, avg(some_avg60) AS some_avg60, avg(some_avg300) AS some_avg300, avg(full_avg10) AS full_avg10, avg(full_avg60) AS full_avg60, avg(full_avg300) AS full_avg300 FROM ${database}.pressure_stall WHERE host='${host}' AND resource='cpu' AND $__timeFilter(ts) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

panels.title: Scheduling rates (context switches / interrupts / softirqs / forks)

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeInterval(ts) AS time, (max(context_switches) - min(context_switches)) / greatest($__interval_s, 1) AS ctxt_sw, (max(interrupts) - min(interrupts)) / greatest($__interval_s, 1) AS interrupts, (max(softirqs) - min(softirqs)) / greatest($__interval_s, 1) AS softirqs, (max(forks) - min(forks)) / greatest($__interval_s, 1) AS forks FROM ${database}.cpu_system_stats WHERE host='${host}' AND $__timeFilter(ts) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

SELECT $__timeInterval(ts) AS time, toLowCardinality(toString(core)) AS core_id, avg(freq_used_hz) AS freq_used_hz FROM ${database}.cpu_core_stats WHERE host='${host}' AND $__timeFilter(ts) GROUP BY time, core_id ORDER BY time, core_id

SELECT $__timeInterval(ts) AS time, toLowCardinality(toString(core)) AS core_id, avg(freq_hz) AS freq_hz FROM ${database}.cpu_core_stats WHERE host='${host}' AND $__timeFilter(ts) GROUP BY time, core_id ORDER BY time, core_id

SELECT $__timeInterval(ts) AS time, toLowCardinality(toString(core)) AS core_id, max(temp_c) AS temp_c FROM ${database}.cpu_core_stats WHERE host='${host}' AND $__timeFilter(ts) GROUP BY time, core_id ORDER BY time, core_id

SELECT $__timeInterval(ts) AS time, toLowCardinality(toString(core)) AS core_id, avg(voltage_v) AS voltage FROM ${database}.cpu_core_stats WHERE host='${host}' AND $__timeFilter(ts) GROUP BY time, core_id ORDER BY time, core_id

SELECT $__timeInterval(ts) AS time, toLowCardinality(toString(package)) AS pkg, avg(power_pkg_watts) AS watts FROM ${database}.cpu_power WHERE host='${host}' AND $__timeFilter(ts) GROUP BY time, pkg ORDER BY time, pkg

SELECT $__timeInterval(ts) AS time, toLowCardinality(toString(package)) AS pkg, avg(uncore_freq_hz) AS uncore_freq_hz FROM ${database}.cpu_power WHERE host='${host}' AND $__timeFilter(ts) GROUP BY time, pkg ORDER BY time, pkg

SELECT $__timeInterval(ts) AS time, toLowCardinality(toString(package)) AS pkg, max(thermal_throttle_events) AS events FROM ${database}.cpu_power WHERE host='${host}' AND $__timeFilter(ts) GROUP BY time, pkg ORDER BY time, pkg

SELECT $__timeInterval(ts) AS time, avg(mem_used_bytes) AS used, avg(cached_bytes) AS cached, avg(buffers_bytes) AS buffers, avg(mem_total_bytes - mem_used_bytes - cached_bytes - buffers_bytes) AS free FROM ${database}.memory_stats WHERE host='${host}' AND $__timeFilter(ts) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

SELECT $__timeInterval(ts) AS time, avg(swap_total_bytes - swap_free_bytes) AS swap_used, avg(swap_cached_bytes) AS swap_cached FROM ${database}.memory_stats WHERE host='${host}' AND $__timeFilter(ts) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

SELECT $__timeInterval(ts) AS time, avg(some_avg10) AS some_avg10, avg(some_avg60) AS some_avg60, avg(some_avg300) AS some_avg300, avg(full_avg10) AS full_avg10, avg(full_avg60) AS full_avg60, avg(full_avg300) AS full_avg300 FROM ${database}.pressure_stall WHERE host='${host}' AND resource='memory' AND $__timeFilter(ts) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

panels.title: Memory regions (anon / mapped / shmem / dirty / writeback / slab)

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeInterval(ts) AS time, avg(anon_pages_bytes) AS anon, avg(mapped_bytes) AS mapped, avg(shmem_bytes) AS shmem, avg(dirty_bytes) AS dirty, avg(writeback_bytes) AS writeback, avg(sreclaimable_bytes) AS slab_reclaim, avg(sunreclaim_bytes) AS slab_unreclaim FROM ${database}.memory_stats WHERE host='${host}' AND $__timeFilter(ts) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time
SELECT $__timeInterval(ts) AS time, avg(huge_pages_total) AS total, avg(huge_pages_free) AS free FROM ${database}.memory_stats WHERE host='${host}' AND $__timeFilter(ts) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

panels.title: Page rates (faults / swap / scans) per second

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeInterval(ts) AS time, (max(pgfault) - min(pgfault)) / greatest($__interval_s, 1) AS minor_fault, (max(pgmajfault) - min(pgmajfault)) / greatest($__interval_s, 1) AS major_fault, (max(pswpin) - min(pswpin)) / greatest($__interval_s, 1) AS swap_in, (max(pswpout) - min(pswpout)) / greatest($__interval_s, 1) AS swap_out, (max(pgscan_direct) - min(pgscan_direct)) / greatest($__interval_s, 1) AS scan_direct, (max(pgscan_kswapd) - min(pgscan_kswapd)) / greatest($__interval_s, 1) AS scan_kswapd FROM ${database}.memory_vmstat WHERE host='${host}' AND $__timeFilter(ts) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time
SELECT $__timeInterval(ts) AS time, max(oom_kill) AS oom_kill FROM ${database}.memory_vmstat WHERE host='${host}' AND $__timeFilter(ts) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

SELECT $__timeInterval(ts) AS time, device, (max(read_sectors) - min(read_sectors)) * 512 / greatest($__interval_s, 1) AS bps FROM ${database}.disk_io WHERE host='${host}' AND $__timeFilter(ts) GROUP BY time, device ORDER BY time, device

SELECT $__timeInterval(ts) AS time, device, (max(write_sectors) - min(write_sectors)) * 512 / greatest($__interval_s, 1) AS bps FROM ${database}.disk_io WHERE host='${host}' AND $__timeFilter(ts) GROUP BY time, device ORDER BY time, device

SELECT $__timeInterval(ts) AS time, device, (max(reads) - min(reads)) / greatest($__interval_s, 1) AS iops FROM ${database}.disk_io WHERE host='${host}' AND $__timeFilter(ts) GROUP BY time, device ORDER BY time, device

SELECT $__timeInterval(ts) AS time, device, (max(writes) - min(writes)) / greatest($__interval_s, 1) AS iops FROM ${database}.disk_io WHERE host='${host}' AND $__timeFilter(ts) GROUP BY time, device ORDER BY time, device

SELECT $__timeInterval(ts) AS time, device, if((max(reads) - min(reads)) = 0, 0, (max(read_time_ms) - min(read_time_ms)) / (max(reads) - min(reads))) AS read_ms, if((max(writes) - min(writes)) = 0, 0, (max(write_time_ms) - min(write_time_ms)) / (max(writes) - min(writes))) AS write_ms FROM ${database}.disk_io WHERE host='${host}' AND $__timeFilter(ts) GROUP BY time, device ORDER BY time, device

SELECT $__timeInterval(ts) AS time, device, least(100, (max(io_time_ms) - min(io_time_ms)) / greatest($__interval_s * 1000, 1) * 100) AS util FROM ${database}.disk_io WHERE host='${host}' AND $__timeFilter(ts) GROUP BY time, device ORDER BY time, device
SELECT $__timeInterval(ts) AS time, device, max(io_in_progress) AS queue FROM ${database}.disk_io WHERE host='${host}' AND $__timeFilter(ts) GROUP BY time, device ORDER BY time, device

SELECT $__timeInterval(ts) AS time, avg(some_avg10) AS some_avg10, avg(some_avg60) AS some_avg60, avg(some_avg300) AS some_avg300, avg(full_avg10) AS full_avg10, avg(full_avg60) AS full_avg60, avg(full_avg300) AS full_avg300 FROM ${database}.pressure_stall WHERE host='${host}' AND resource='io' AND $__timeFilter(ts) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

SELECT $__timeInterval(ts) AS time, mount_point, avg(if(size_total_bytes=0, 0, size_used_bytes / size_total_bytes * 100)) AS pct FROM ${database}.filesystem_stats WHERE host='${host}' AND $__timeFilter(ts) GROUP BY time, mount_point ORDER BY time, mount_point

SELECT $__timeInterval(ts) AS time, mount_point, avg(if(inodes_total=0, 0, inodes_used / inodes_total * 100)) AS pct FROM ${database}.filesystem_stats WHERE host='${host}' AND $__timeFilter(ts) GROUP BY time, mount_point ORDER BY time, mount_point

SELECT mount_point, fstype, device, formatReadableSize(argMax(size_total_bytes, ts)) AS total, formatReadableSize(argMax(size_used_bytes, ts)) AS used, formatReadableSize(argMax(size_available_bytes, ts)) AS avail, round(argMax(if(size_total_bytes=0, 0, size_used_bytes / size_total_bytes * 100), ts), 1) AS pct, argMax(inodes_used, ts) AS inodes_used, argMax(inodes_total, ts) AS inodes_total, argMax(read_only, ts) AS ro FROM ${database}.filesystem_stats WHERE host='${host}' AND ts >= now() - INTERVAL 5 MINUTE GROUP BY mount_point, fstype, device ORDER BY pct DESC

SELECT device, argMax(model, ts) AS model, argMax(serial, ts) AS serial, argMax(firmware, ts) AS firmware, argMax(temp_c, ts) AS temp_c, argMax(power_on_hours, ts) AS power_on_hrs, argMax(power_cycle_count, ts) AS power_cycles, argMax(reallocated_sectors, ts) AS realloc, argMax(pending_sectors, ts) AS pending, argMax(uncorrectable_sectors, ts) AS uncorrect, argMax(crc_errors, ts) AS crc, argMax(wear_leveling_pct, ts) AS wear_pct, argMax(health_ok, ts) AS ok FROM ${database}.smart_stats WHERE host='${host}' AND ts >= now() - INTERVAL 5 MINUTE GROUP BY device ORDER BY device
SELECT $__timeInterval(ts) AS time, device, max(temp_c) AS temp_c FROM ${database}.smart_stats WHERE host='${host}' AND $__timeFilter(ts) GROUP BY time, device ORDER BY time, device
SELECT $__timeInterval(ts) AS time, device, avg(wear_leveling_pct) AS wear FROM ${database}.smart_stats WHERE host='${host}' AND $__timeFilter(ts) GROUP BY time, device ORDER BY time, device

panels.title: Drive sector errors (reallocated / pending / uncorrectable / crc)

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeInterval(ts) AS time, device, max(reallocated_sectors) AS realloc, max(pending_sectors) AS pending, max(uncorrectable_sectors) AS uncorrect, max(crc_errors) AS crc FROM ${database}.smart_stats WHERE host='${host}' AND $__timeFilter(ts) GROUP BY time, device ORDER BY time, device

SELECT $__timeInterval(ts) AS time, iface, (max(rx_bytes) - min(rx_bytes)) / greatest($__interval_s, 1) AS bps FROM ${database}.network_interface WHERE host='${host}' AND $__timeFilter(ts) GROUP BY time, iface ORDER BY time, iface

SELECT $__timeInterval(ts) AS time, iface, (max(tx_bytes) - min(tx_bytes)) / greatest($__interval_s, 1) AS bps FROM ${database}.network_interface WHERE host='${host}' AND $__timeFilter(ts) GROUP BY time, iface ORDER BY time, iface

SELECT $__timeInterval(ts) AS time, iface, (max(rx_packets) - min(rx_packets)) / greatest($__interval_s, 1) AS pps FROM ${database}.network_interface WHERE host='${host}' AND $__timeFilter(ts) GROUP BY time, iface ORDER BY time, iface

SELECT $__timeInterval(ts) AS time, iface, (max(tx_packets) - min(tx_packets)) / greatest($__interval_s, 1) AS pps FROM ${database}.network_interface WHERE host='${host}' AND $__timeFilter(ts) GROUP BY time, iface ORDER BY time, iface

SELECT $__timeInterval(ts) AS time, iface, (max(rx_errors) - min(rx_errors)) / greatest($__interval_s, 1) AS errors, (max(rx_dropped) - min(rx_dropped)) / greatest($__interval_s, 1) AS dropped FROM ${database}.network_interface WHERE host='${host}' AND $__timeFilter(ts) GROUP BY time, iface ORDER BY time, iface

SELECT $__timeInterval(ts) AS time, iface, (max(tx_errors) - min(tx_errors)) / greatest($__interval_s, 1) AS errors, (max(tx_dropped) - min(tx_dropped)) / greatest($__interval_s, 1) AS dropped, (max(tx_collisions) - min(tx_collisions)) / greatest($__interval_s, 1) AS collisions FROM ${database}.network_interface WHERE host='${host}' AND $__timeFilter(ts) GROUP BY time, iface ORDER BY time, iface

SELECT iface, argMax(speed_mbps, ts) AS speed_mbps, argMax(duplex, ts) AS duplex, argMax(link_up, ts) AS link_up, formatReadableSize(argMax(rx_bytes, ts)) AS rx_total, formatReadableSize(argMax(tx_bytes, ts)) AS tx_total, argMax(rx_errors, ts) AS rx_errs, argMax(tx_errors, ts) AS tx_errs, argMax(rx_dropped, ts) AS rx_drop, argMax(tx_dropped, ts) AS tx_drop FROM ${database}.network_interface WHERE host='${host}' AND ts >= now() - INTERVAL 5 MINUTE GROUP BY iface ORDER BY iface

SELECT $__timeInterval(ts) AS time, (max(in_segs) - min(in_segs)) / greatest($__interval_s, 1) AS in_segs, (max(out_segs) - min(out_segs)) / greatest($__interval_s, 1) AS out_segs FROM ${database}.network_tcp WHERE host='${host}' AND $__timeFilter(ts) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time
SELECT $__timeInterval(ts) AS time, avg(curr_estab) AS curr_estab FROM ${database}.network_tcp WHERE host='${host}' AND $__timeFilter(ts) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

SELECT $__timeInterval(ts) AS time, (max(active_opens) - min(active_opens)) / greatest($__interval_s, 1) AS active, (max(passive_opens) - min(passive_opens)) / greatest($__interval_s, 1) AS passive FROM ${database}.network_tcp WHERE host='${host}' AND $__timeFilter(ts) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

panels.title: TCP retransmits / s (total / lost / fast / slow-start)

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeInterval(ts) AS time, (max(retrans_segs) - min(retrans_segs)) / greatest($__interval_s, 1) AS total, (max(tcp_lost_retransmit) - min(tcp_lost_retransmit)) / greatest($__interval_s, 1) AS lost, (max(tcp_fast_retrans) - min(tcp_fast_retrans)) / greatest($__interval_s, 1) AS fast, (max(tcp_slow_start_retrans) - min(tcp_slow_start_retrans)) / greatest($__interval_s, 1) AS slow_start FROM ${database}.network_tcp WHERE host='${host}' AND $__timeFilter(ts) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

panels.title: TCP connection errors / s (fails / resets / listen drops / overflows)

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeInterval(ts) AS time, (max(attempt_fails) - min(attempt_fails)) / greatest($__interval_s, 1) AS attempt_fails, (max(estab_resets) - min(estab_resets)) / greatest($__interval_s, 1) AS estab_resets, (max(listen_drops) - min(listen_drops)) / greatest($__interval_s, 1) AS listen_drops, (max(listen_overflows) - min(listen_overflows)) / greatest($__interval_s, 1) AS listen_overflows FROM ${database}.network_tcp WHERE host='${host}' AND $__timeFilter(ts) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

SELECT $__timeInterval(ts) AS time, concat(family, '/', state) AS label, avg(count) AS count FROM ${database}.network_socket_states WHERE host='${host}' AND $__timeFilter(ts) GROUP BY time, label ORDER BY time, label
SELECT $__timeInterval(ts) AS time, avg(count) AS count, avg(max) AS max FROM ${database}.network_conntrack WHERE host='${host}' AND $__timeFilter(ts) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

SELECT $__timeInterval(ts) AS time, avg(running) AS running, avg(sleeping) AS sleeping, avg(disk_sleep) AS disk_sleep, avg(stopped) AS stopped, avg(zombie) AS zombie, avg(idle) AS idle FROM ${database}.process_summary WHERE host='${host}' AND $__timeFilter(ts) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

SELECT pid, comm, round(avg(cpu_user_pct + cpu_system_pct), 2) AS cpu_pct, round(avg(rss_bytes)/1024/1024, 1) AS rss_mb, avg(threads) AS threads, avg(fds) AS fds FROM ${database}.process_stats WHERE host='${host}' AND ts >= now() - INTERVAL 1 MINUTE GROUP BY pid, comm ORDER BY cpu_pct DESC LIMIT 15

SELECT pid, comm, formatReadableSize(argMax(rss_bytes, ts)) AS rss, formatReadableSize(argMax(vsz_bytes, ts)) AS vsz, argMax(threads, ts) AS threads, argMax(fds, ts) AS fds FROM ${database}.process_stats WHERE host='${host}' AND ts >= now() - INTERVAL 1 MINUTE GROUP BY pid, comm ORDER BY argMax(rss_bytes, ts) DESC LIMIT 15

SELECT pid, comm, argMax(fds, ts) AS fds, argMax(threads, ts) AS threads, formatReadableSize(argMax(rss_bytes, ts)) AS rss FROM ${database}.process_stats WHERE host='${host}' AND ts >= now() - INTERVAL 1 MINUTE GROUP BY pid, comm ORDER BY fds DESC LIMIT 15

SELECT pid, comm, argMax(threads, ts) AS threads, argMax(fds, ts) AS fds, formatReadableSize(argMax(rss_bytes, ts)) AS rss FROM ${database}.process_stats WHERE host='${host}' AND ts >= now() - INTERVAL 1 MINUTE GROUP BY pid, comm ORDER BY threads DESC LIMIT 15

SELECT pid, comm, max(majflt) - min(majflt) AS major_faults, max(minflt) - min(minflt) AS minor_faults, formatReadableSize(argMax(rss_bytes, ts)) AS rss FROM ${database}.process_stats WHERE host='${host}' AND ts >= now() - INTERVAL 5 MINUTE GROUP BY pid, comm HAVING major_faults > 0 ORDER BY major_faults DESC LIMIT 10

SELECT host, argMax(kernel_version, ts) AS kernel, argMax(os_release, ts) AS os, argMax(uptime_seconds, ts) AS uptime_s, argMax(users_logged_in, ts) AS users, argMax(fds_allocated, ts) AS fds_used, argMax(fds_max, ts) AS fds_max FROM ${database}.system_info WHERE host='${host}' AND ts >= now() - INTERVAL 5 MINUTE GROUP BY host
SELECT $__timeInterval(ts) AS time, avg(fds_allocated) AS allocated, avg(fds_max) AS max FROM ${database}.system_info WHERE host='${host}' AND $__timeFilter(ts) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time
SELECT $__timeInterval(ts) AS time, max(users_logged_in) AS users FROM ${database}.system_info WHERE host='${host}' AND $__timeFilter(ts) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

list.name: database
list.label: Database
list.query: SELECT name FROM system.databases WHERE name NOT IN ('system','INFORMATION_SCHEMA','information_schema') ORDER BY name

list.name: host
list.label: Host
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT host FROM ${database}.cpu_system_stats ORDER BY host
